title: cinnagrostis rauhii
intro: Cinnagrostis rauhii, also known as dwarf bamboo grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cinnagrostis rauhii include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Cinnagrostis rauhii can be prepared as a decoction or tea by infusing the dried leaves and stems in hot water, and it is also used in some herbal remedies in combination with other plants.
